vocab.example: As a child, I often sought out moments of solitary introspection, finding peace in drawing or reading by myself.

vocab.meaning: bản tính thích giao du, hòa đồng
vocab.example: Owing to my gregarious nature, I was always at the heart of any group activity on the playground.
Building complex Lego structures with my cousins really helped cultivate a collaborative spirit from a young age.
I preferred playing alone because it gave me a sense of autonomy over the rules and the pace of the game.

vocab.meaning: sự tương tác với bạn bè đồng trang lứa
vocab.example: Constant peer interaction during team sports was essential for developing my social confidence.

vocab.meaning: không bị gò bó/hạn chế bởi
vocab.example: I enjoyed solo activities because my imagination felt unfettered by the opinions or requirements of others.
Group games served as my primary vehicle for social integration when I first started primary school.

vocab.meaning: tính cách hướng nội/thích suy tư
vocab.example: My introspective temperament meant that I usually felt drained after too much group play and needed time alone to recharge.
There was a unique sense of shared exhilaration when our whole neighborhood group finally finished building our treehouse.

vocab.meaning: sự xung đột về tính cách
vocab.example: I sometimes avoided group activities to stay away from the inevitable clash of personalities that occurred during competitive games.
